text.text: Welcome to the Betweenlands Tinker Encyclopedia!
This guide covers all the new tools and materials added by this mod.

Using the Animator, convert Tinkers' tools (Pickaxe, Shovel, Hatchet, Broadsword) or parts (Tool Rods, Bindings, Heads) into Betweenlands variants. Tools retain all stats and are immune to weakness; parts can only replace existing tool components, not craft new tools.
Enjoy your journey through the swamps!
